steps.title: The Sunken Steps
steps.area: M O S S V E I L

props.text:
Z or SPACE — jump
hold to leap higher

X — strike  ·  C — dash
down-strike in the air to bounce off foes

The walls remember
those who climb.

Rest, wanderer —
your path is remembered.

F (hold) — focus reaped soul, mend a mask
F (tap) — loose a wisp of soul

The dark gnaws.
Follow the crystal-glow.

TURN BACK.
The glade's heart is claimed.

The glade breathes again.
Thank you, little wanderer.

Wings of the pale moth,
shed in shadow. Take them.

City of Tears
